calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Judge Pro Tem Theresa Moore, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Claudio Carvalo Veras appears in Pro Per (no appearace by Marta Jose Rocha), witnesses, Claudir Gomes and Josein Rad; Respondent, Ibarra Professional Law Corporation appears by Crisostomo G. Ibarra with witness Annie Velasquez, acting office adminstrator. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Moore.

EXHR (A) RETAINER AGREEMENT/3 SETS E-MAIL(A,B,C)
EXHR (B) VARIOUS WORK PACKAGE
EXHA (1) WAIVER LETTER

10:18AM
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained. Judge Moore asked if the parties want their evidence back or can the Court discard them. Both parties informed the Court that they are copies and the Court can discard them.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Reset From Jan-02-14 To Jan-17-14 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
